entityresolution.schemamapping.CfnAbout: Creates a schema mapping, which defines the schema of the input customer records table. The `SchemaMapping` also provides AWS Entity Resolution with some metadata about the table, such as the attribute types of the columns and which columns to match on.

entityresolution.schemamapping.MappedInp.Description: A list of `MappedInputFields`. Each `MappedInputField` corresponds to a column the source data table, and contains column name plus additional information that AWS Entity Resolution uses for matching.

entityresolution.schemamapping.SchemaNam.Description: The name of the schema. There cannot be multiple `SchemaMappings` with the same name.

entityresolution.schemamapping.Tags.Description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.
